author: hicks
summary_paragraph: The defendant, Michael Euliano, appeals his conviction on one count of second degree assault, see RSA 631:2 (2007) (amended 2010), one count of conduct after an accident, see RSA 264:25 (2004), and two counts of reckless conduct, see RSA 631:3 (2007). summary_paragraph: The respondent, Richard Leone, appeals a decision by the Littleton Family Division (Cyr, J.) denying his request to testify telephonically in defense of the domestic violence petition brought by the petitioner, Cindy Leone. We reverse and remand.

summary_paragraph: The defendant, Jerome Thompson, appeals his conviction by a jury of one count of aggravated felonious sexual assault. See RSA 632- A:2, II (2007). case_name: Appeal of City of Lebanon
author: hicks
summary_paragraph: The City of Lebanon (city), appeals a decision of the New Hampshire Board of Tax and Land Appeals (BTLA) granting Colonial Plaza Realty Trust (trust) an abatement of taxes imposed on its property for the years 2006 and 2007. We affirm.

author: hicks
summary_paragraph: The plaintiff, David J. Lovejoy, appeals an order of the Superior Court (Nicolosi, J.) dismissing his claim for invasion of privacy by public disclosure of private facts against defendants James Daniel Linehan and Mark Peirce. We affirm.

case_name: 009-703, State of New Hampshire v. Jennifer Long
author: per_curiam

hicks.note: DALIANIS, C.J., and HICKS and CONBOY, JJ., concurred.

summary_paragraph: Following her conviction for resisting arrest, see RSA 642:2 (Supp. 2010), the defendant, Jennifer Long, appeals a ruling of the Superior Court (McGuire, J.) permitting the State to impeach her credibility with her prior conviction for attempted fraudulent use of a credit card. We affirm.
